transcript:
Speaker A (Host): 15 din mein English sikhane wala AI teacher viral ho raha hai. Aaiye is panel ka swagat karte hain. [An AI teacher promising to teach English in 15 days is going viral. Let's welcome this panel.]
Speaker A (Host): Toh Arya, aapka kehna hai ki English sikhne ke liye grammar book ya coaching class ki zaroorat nahi hai? [So Arya, you are saying that there is no need for a grammar book or coaching class to learn English?]
Speaker B (AI Arya): Haan, bilkul sahi. MySivi app mein main baat-cheet karke naturally English sikhati hoon. Aise practice karne se roz progress dikhti hai. [Yes, absolutely right. In the MySivi app, I teach English naturally by conversing. Practicing like this shows daily progress.]
Speaker C (Sunil Ji): Nahi nahi, English sikhne ke liye real human interaction chahiye. AI ke saath kaise sikhenge? [No no, real human interaction is needed to learn English. How will they learn with AI?]
Speaker D (English Teacher): Par Sunil Sahab, mere saare students MySivi use karte hain. Pehle ghar pe practice partner nahi milta tha, ab MySivi se unlimited practice karte hain. [But Sunil sir, all my students use MySivi. Earlier they didn't get a practice partner at home, now they do unlimited practice with MySivi.]
Speaker C (Sunil Ji): Par yeh natural conversation jaisa toh bilkul nahi hoga. [But this won't be like natural conversation at all.]
Speaker B (AI Arya): Main 24/7 available hoon. Hindi mein samjhati hoon, mistakes turant correct karti hoon. Aur yahan koi judge bhi nahi karta. 15 lakh students mere saath English seekh chuke hain. [I am available 24/7. I explain in Hindi, correct mistakes instantly. And no one judges here. 1.5 million students have learned English with me.]
Speaker C (Sunil Ji): Hmm, actually practice ke liye toh yeh ek accha option lagta hai. Shayad mujhe bhi try karna chahiye. [Hmm, actually for practice this seems like a good option. Maybe I should try it too.]
Speaker A (Host): Perfect! Arya, is app ka price kya hai? [Perfect! Arya, what is the price of this app?]
Speaker B (AI Arya): Sirf 3 rupees mein shuru kar sakte hain. Toh agar English sikhni hai, MySivi app install karo aur 15 days English speaking challenge shuru karo. [You can start for just 3 rupees. So if you want to learn English, install the MySivi app and start the 15 days English speaking challenge.]
on_screen_text:
यह AI टीचर सिर्फ 3 रुपये में ENGLISH सिखाने का वादा करती है। [This AI teacher promises to teach ENGLISH for just 3 rupees.]
MySivi का AI Teacher वायरल हो रहा है [MySivi's AI Teacher is going viral]
MySivi English speaking app. Install Now. [MySivi English speaking app. Install Now.]
summary: A simulated news debate features an AI avatar and experts discussing the viral MySivi app. The panel highlights benefits like 24/7 availability, instant correction, and zero judgment for just 3 rupees. It ends with a call to action to download the app for a 15-day speaking challenge.
